participants.name: Kobe Baynes
participants.notes: Guard. Previously attended the American Bowl all-star game.

participants.name: Enrique Cruz Jr.
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Combine results: 4.94 40-yard dash, 35-inch vertical, 116-inch broad jump. Measured 6-5 1/2, 313 lbs, 33 3/4 arms at combine. May have stood on combine numbers or re-tested at pro day. Pro day specific numbers not yet published.

participants.name: Jalon Daniels
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Ran 4.65 40-yard dash at combine; did not participate in other combine drills. Threw at pro day. Pro day specific testing numbers not yet published.

participants.name: Tommy Dunn Jr.
participants.notes: Previously attended Hula Bowl all-star game.

participants.name: Doug Emilien
participants.notes: Ran 40-yard dash at pro day (confirmed via photo gallery showing second 40 attempt).

participants.name: Justice Finkley
participants.notes: Defensive end. Transfer from Alabama (originally Texas). Ran 40-yard dash at pro day (confirmed via photo gallery showing second 40 attempt). Also did positional drills.

participants.name: Bryce Foster
participants.notes: Center. Previously attended American Bowl all-star game. Did OL drills at pro day.

participants.name: Nolan Gorczyca
participants.notes: Offensive tackle. Did OL drills at pro day.

participants.name: DJ Graham
participants.notes: Cornerback. Listed as DJ Graham II in photo captions. Ran 40-yard dash at pro day (confirmed via photo gallery showing second 40 attempt).

participants.name: Boden Groen

participants.name: DeShawn Hanika

participants.name: Emmanuel Henderson Jr.
participants.notes: NFL Combine invite. Transfer from Alabama. Combine results: 4.44 40-yard dash, 35-inch vertical, 120-inch broad jump. Did positional/receiving drills at pro day. Pro day specific testing numbers not yet published.

participants.name: Daniel Hishaw Jr.
participants.notes: Running back. Ran 40-yard dash at pro day (confirmed via photo gallery showing second 40 attempt).

participants.name: Bangally Kamara
participants.notes: Linebacker. Had an invitation to the American Bowl but was not on the final roster.

participants.name: Laith Marjan
participants.notes: Kicker. Appeared at NFL Combine Specialist Showcase. Previously attended Hula Bowl. Kicked at pro day (confirmed via photo gallery). Transfer from South Alabama.

participants.name: Levi Wentz
participants.notes: Wide receiver. Previously attended College Gridiron Showcase. Did receiving drills at pro day.

participants.name: DJ Withers
participants.notes: Defensive tackle. Previously attended College Gridiron Showcase.

participants.name: Leshon Williams
participants.notes: Running back. Transfer from Iowa. Previously attended Hula Bowl. Did receiving drills at pro day.

additional_notes: Kansas held its 2026 Pro Day on Wednesday, March 11, 2026, at the Anderson Football Complex in Lawrence, Kansas. This was KU's first on-campus pro day since 2023 after the Big 12 experimented with centralized league-wide pro day events in Frisco, Texas, in 2024 and 2025. A total of 23 participants worked out. The afternoon began with measurements, bench press, and vertical jump in the Anderson Family Complex weight room, before transitioning to the Indoor Complex for on-field drills including the 40-yard dash, broad jump, shuttles, three-cone drill, and positional drills. Four KU players (Enrique Cruz Jr., Jalon Daniels, Emmanuel Henderson Jr., Laith Marjan) had previously attended the NFL Scouting Combine. CRITICAL NOTE: The specific numerical testing results from this pro day are contained in a 'Pro Day Results' PDF document and 'Pro Day Book' hosted on kuathletics.com, but these documents are not accessible via web search text extraction. The pro day occurred less than 24 hours before this search (evening of March 11 / morning of March 12), and no media outlet has yet published a detailed numerical recap of the testing results. The participant list is confirmed and complete per the official KU athletics announcement. Drill-specific results should be sourced directly from the KU athletics PDF documents or from forthcoming media coverage.
